reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: Very high fee. Not worthy. Please choose some other good schools.

reviews.author: Praywin
reviews.review_body: High fees. Not worthy. you will always regret later. please choose some other good schools . Management is fully towards business and money. Always finds new ways to increase the fee exponentially. They don`t care about the children`s educational quality or children welfare. My kids are studying here for the past 12 years. I have seen everything. My sincere advice to everyone,  if you want to spend your money lavishly you can go for this school. Else if you want to give a high and valuable education please don`t choose this school.

reviews.author: Bobby R
reviews.review_body:
"SSVM World School excels with its impressive infrastructure, well-qualified teachers, and visionary correspondent. Their innovative approaches make
learning enjoyable for students and teachers alike."

reviews.author: Rkm
reviews.review_body: Middle class parents don't take risk your life

reviews.author: We Otaku
reviews.review_body: While the teaching is medicore the amount of pressure put on the students of grade 10 is not measurable. The constant shuffling of classes leads to instability and someof the students even fall into loneliness and they don't find a friend. Even if the reason behind this is valid this is not at all working. I wouldn't recommend any parent to put their child in SSVM for grade 10 as my child is now not talking properly at home and now has no friends.

reviews.author: Jn
reviews.review_body: I love SSVM this is the best school and the staff the correspondent are all supporting and they conduct many programs which involves a lot of students and the teaching is just wonderful

reviews.author: Uma Devi N
reviews.review_body: Not at all recommended for residential programs. Not flexible at all many hostel students discontinue for their rigid rules. They treat parents like students. I say about their another branch at Alaangombu Coimbatore.

reviews.author: Jay Golcha
reviews.review_body: Being part of SSVM institutions was a totally different and amazing experience in my life..The kind of exposure that this intuition gave me, i doubt anyone else could have done that..Very open minded and open to new ideas all the time..Most importantly the management is really good which helps students to connect with them easily.

reviews.author: Srinidhi Thiruppathi
reviews.review_body: My time at SSVM  has been a significant period of growth and learning. The experiences, both academic and extracurricular, have shaped my skills, interests, and overall perspective. Overall, my experience at SSVM has been enriching and transformative. The school has provided me with a solid academic foundation, opportunities for personal growth, and memories that I will cherish forever. I am grateful for the support and guidance I have received and feel well-prepared for the next steps in my academic and personal journey.
